subcodes.first_line: O thou who art illumined by the lights of guidance! This world is the realm of contingent beings, and darkness and imperfection are among its characteristics [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستضی بانوار هدایت این جهان عالم امکانست و ظلمت و نقص از خصائص آن این
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @light and darkness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
